contractor_pricing_source: Preliminary estimates from 2 local contractors (East Cape / Los Cabos region) based on executive plan set and engineering package
notes: Contractor pricing of USD $3.4M is USD $600,000 below the client's stated maximum budget of USD $4M — negative variance of 15%, meaning the project is within budget with margin. Solar and greywater systems are included in the contractor total. The infinity pool hydraulic and structural costs are included as a line item. Recommend proceeding to executive plans without scope reduction.
